subject: texas monthly november 2001: how enron blew it

emails.subject: RE: Texas Monthly November 2001: How Enron Blew It
emails.subject_base: Texas Monthly November 2001: How Enron Blew It
emails.body: RE: Texas Monthly November 2001: How Enron Blew It boone just called me work. he's drumming up support for a trip to br for the ole miss game. i thought about it and it does seem like it will be a good time. LSU OLE MISS lots of hot chicks. what do you think? ckl To: Landry, Chad; Blanchard, Timothy

emails.subject: RE: Texas Monthly November 2001: How Enron Blew It

emails.body: RE: Texas Monthly November 2001: How Enron Blew It call me wehen you get a chance To: Landry, Chad; Blanchard, Timothy

emails.body: call me. i cant find your number through the operator. To: Lenhart, Matthew
